scripts.lint: node -e "try{require.resolve('eslint-plugin-unicorn')}catch{console.error('\n  Run npm install first — new dependencies were added in the Week 4 PR.\n');process.exit(1)}" && eslint src/js/ netlify/functions/ --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern
scripts.preinstall:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(fs.existsSync('.eslintrc.cjs')){console.log('
  ⚠️  Your project is upgrading from ESLint 8 to ESLint 9.
     .eslintrc.cjs will be replaced by eslint.config.js (flat config).
     See docs/tutorials/what-are-hooks.md to understand what just happened.
')}"
scripts.postinstall:
echo '
  ✅ Dependencies updated. Run npm run lint to see your new linting rules.
     Read docs/tutorials/npm-lifecycle-scripts.md to learn about the hooks that just ran.
'
